title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-22
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the repository.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory and greenhouse metrics remain accurate and up-to-date for visitors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener/inspector, checking on plants (apps) in a greenhouse, with a robot companion helping record metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, displaying a green checkmark on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, displaying a green checkmark on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background.
